hero.subtitle: Drive measurable results with targeted Paid Ads management on Meta and Rednote. We blend technical precision with creative excellence to optimise your budget, ensuring your brand stands out in the feed and delivers scalable growth across the most influential social platforms.

details.title: What We Do & Why It Matters
details.card1Desc: High-intent searches are happening every day, but most accounts waste spend on weak keywords, broad targeting, and campaigns with no clear conversion structure.
details.card2Desc: We plan, build, and manage Google Ads systems across Search, Shopping, and Performance Max with tighter keyword strategy, cleaner tracking, and disciplined budget control.
details.card3Desc: More qualified clicks, better visibility on revenue-driving searches, and clearer attribution from ad spend to enquiries, purchases, and return on ad spend.

subFeatures.title: Every Deliverable,
subFeatures.item1Desc: High-intent keyword targeting built around the terms your customers use when they are ready to enquire or buy.
subFeatures.item2Desc: Product feed optimisation and Shopping campaign management that helps ecommerce brands win more visibility for revenue-driving products.
subFeatures.item3Desc: Cross-network campaign management with asset, audience, and feed inputs structured for stronger machine-learning performance.
subFeatures.item4Desc: Tighter account structure, match-type control, and search query review to reduce wasted spend and improve conversion quality.
subFeatures.item5Desc: Reliable event setup for leads, calls, purchases, and key actions so budget decisions are based on real outcomes, not vanity metrics.
subFeatures.item6Desc: Ongoing bid, budget, and creative refinements focused on cost efficiency, conversion growth, and sustainable account performance.

caseStudy.title: Real Results for Real Businesses
caseStudy.case1Problem: The brand was spending $8K per month with poor campaign structure, weak product feed setup, and limited control over wasted search terms. Revenue was inconsistent and ROAS stayed low.
caseStudy.case2Problem: There was no paid search system in place, so seasonal enrolment peaks were being missed. High-intent searches existed, but the brand had no reliable way to convert them into leads.
